rationale: Abstract X is superior because it explicitly characterizes the mechanistic scope of dysregulation (coordinated negative regulation of ion channel activity, aberrant smooth-muscle gene enrichment) with greater precision, giving the results section more scientific rigor despite its slightly denser prose.
loser_weakness: Abstract Y's results section was less rigorous: it omitted the explicit framing of coordinated network dysregulation and the distinction between direct miR1 targets and downstream indirect changes, reducing the mechanistic depth expected by CircAE readers.
